response: <<Ava started the day with>> <<50 pencils>>. <<At recess>> <<she gave>> <<4 pencils>> <<to her classmate>> <<Emma>>. <<Later>> <<she lost>> <<2 pencils>> <<while walking home from school>>. <<In the evening>> <<Ava's dad bought her a new pencil case>> <<with 15 pencils>>. <<Emma came over>> <<and gave Ava three times as many pencils>> <<as she received at recess>>. <<So>> <<Ava received>> <<3*4=12 pencils>> <<from Emma>>. <<Thus>> <<Ava ended the day with>> <<50-4-2+15+12>> <<pencils>>. <<Ask>> <<if you need further details>> <<about the calculation>> <<or>> <<any other question>> <<related to the scenario>>. <<cost>>
